title: Wire real-time stdout/stderr streaming for CLI harness child processes
acceptanceCriteria: invokeHarness() pipes child process stdout/stderr in real-time, not after exit
JournalWatcher receives incremental output events during CLI harness execution
Pi adapter streaming continues to work (no regression)
Output events are timestamped and associated with the correct effect ID
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): stream CLI harness stdout/stderr in real-time

title: Wire ephemeral cache_control API integration uniformly across adapters
acceptanceCriteria: Stable strata sections include cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' } in API calls
All harness adapters apply cache hints based on strata volatility scores
Cache-break detection via checksums triggers cache invalidation appropriately
Token cost reduction is measurable in test scenarios
suggestedPrScope: feat(sdk): wire ephemeral cache_control across all prompt adapters

title: Wire auto-downgrade model selection when approaching session budget limits
acceptanceCriteria: When session cost exceeds 80% of budget, model selection automatically downgrades to cheaper model
Downgrade respects task requirements (does not downgrade below minimum capability)
Budget alert thresholds trigger downgrade evaluation
Operator can override auto-downgrade via config tool
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): auto-downgrade model when approaching session budget

title: Wire ChannelPermissionRelay into breakpoint resolution flow
acceptanceCriteria: Breakpoint resolution checks for channel-based approvals via ChannelPermissionRelay
Racing claim pattern works: first response (local or channel) wins
Security config (terminalOnlyTags) is respected
Channel approvals are logged to governance-decisions.jsonl
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): wire channel permission relay into breakpoint resolution

title: Implement HTTP webhook delivery with throttling and deduplication
acceptanceCriteria: Registered webhooks receive HTTP POST with event payload on run state changes
Delivery uses fetch() with configurable timeout and retry
Alert-level evaluation filters events by severity before delivery
Deduplication prevents duplicate deliveries within configurable window
Delivery failures are logged but do not block orchestration
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): implement HTTP webhook delivery with throttling

title: Add reversibility assessment framework and blast radius prompt section
acceptanceCriteria: New safetyGuidelines prompt section renders reversibility assessment guidance
Blast radius reasoning instructions included in prompt for destructive operations
Section mapped in PART_STRATA_MAP as stable stratum
Template file exists at packages/babysitter-sdk/src/prompts/templates/safety-guidelines.md
suggestedPrScope: feat(sdk): add reversibility and blast radius prompt framework

title: Add prompt section that renders long-term memories into new run prompts
acceptanceCriteria: New longTermMemory prompt part renders extracted memories from memoryExtraction.ts
Memories are filtered by relevance (project, category) and recency
Section mapped in PART_STRATA_MAP as runtime stratum
Memories appear in assembled prompts for new runs
suggestedPrScope: feat(sdk): inject long-term memories into new run prompts

title: Add plugin blocklist data store and provenance tracking at install time
acceptanceCriteria: Blocklist stored as JSON file with plugin identifiers and block reasons
Plugin loader rejects blocklisted plugins at load time
Provenance metadata (source URL, install timestamp, installer) recorded at install
Provenance queryable via plugin:info command
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): add plugin blocklist and provenance tracking

title: Add TrustLevel field to plugin registry with hook dispatch gating
acceptanceCriteria: PluginRegistryEntry includes TrustLevel field (trusted, verified, untrusted)
Hook dispatch checks TrustLevel before invoking plugin hooks
Untrusted plugins cannot register high-privilege hooks (execute, auth)
Trust level assignable at install time and modifiable via plugin:trust command
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): add TrustLevel to plugin registry with hook gating

title: Add REST-style JSON session management API following api/ patterns
acceptanceCriteria: api/sessions.ts provides createSession, getSession, listSessions, deleteSession with ApiResult envelopes
Session CRUD operations map to existing session module functions
Consistent with api/runs.ts and api/effects.ts patterns
MCP tools can delegate to the new API layer
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): add JSON session management API

title: Wire context isolation and model override into sub-harness invocation
acceptanceCriteria: SubprocessInvocation model field is respected when selecting harness for child run
Child runs execute in isolated context (separate journal, separate working state)
Background execution with progress tracking via BackgroundEffectStatus
Parent run receives child run completion events
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): add context isolation and model override to sub-harness invocation

title: Ensure automatic cross-run state persistence for all run types
acceptanceCriteria: SessionContext automatically persists at run completion (all run types, not just interactive)
New runs within a session automatically receive accumulated state
State injection works for both babysitter:call and babysitter:yolo modes
Cross-run shared knowledge is available in subprocess invocations when shareSession=true
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): auto-persist cross-run state for all run types

title: Add instructions:inspect CLI command with token counts and cache annotations
acceptanceCriteria: instructions:inspect command displays assembled prompt sections with token counts per section
Cache-stability annotations show which sections are stable/runtime/turnLocal
Checksum values displayed for each section to identify cache breaks
Output supports both human-readable and JSON formats
suggestedPrScope: feat(sdk): add instructions:inspect command with token counts

title: Generalize InstructionsLoaded hook as SDK-level hook type
acceptanceCriteria: SDK hook types (packages/babysitter-sdk/src/hooks/types.ts) include on-instructions-loaded
Hook fires after prompt assembly with access to assembled prompt metadata
All harness adapters (not just CC adapter) support the hook
Existing CC adapter implementation delegates to the SDK-level hook
suggestedPrScope: feat(sdk): generalize InstructionsLoaded as SDK-level hook type

title: Implement host contract methods and expose via MCP/HTTP
acceptanceCriteria: hostContract.ts implements startRun(), getStatus(), postEffect(), subscribe() methods
Methods exposed as MCP tools or HTTP endpoints
At least one consumer exists (MCP server or API route)
HostCapabilityManifest validated at connection time
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): implement host contract methods with MCP exposure

title: Upgrade skill-level chaining to process-level pipelines with typed I/O
acceptanceCriteria: ProcessPipeline type with typed input/output schemas between stages
Pipeline stages can reference process definitions (not just skills)
Topological sorting and dependency validation from SkillChainBuilder preserved
Pipeline execution passes typed data between stages with validation
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): upgrade to process-level pipelines with typed I/O

title: Extract progress percentage and ETA from streaming harness output
acceptanceCriteria: BackgroundEffectStatus includes progressPercent and estimatedCompletionTime fields
Progress extraction works from streaming output using configurable patterns
ETA estimation uses elapsed time and progress percentage

title: Add hang detection and auto-recovery for subagent execution
acceptanceCriteria: Hang detection triggers when no output received for configurable duration
Auto-recovery attempts retry before escalating to cancellation
Recovery strategy configurable per task definition (retry, fallback, cancel)
Hang events logged to journal
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): add hang detection and auto-recovery for subagents

title: Enable streaming message rendering for non-Pi harness invocations
acceptanceCriteria: CLI harness invocations render output incrementally (not after completion)

suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): streaming message rendering for all harness types

title: Wire concurrent effect execution into the orchestration loop
acceptanceCriteria: orchestrateIteration.ts can execute effects concurrently using execution waves
Concurrent path is feature-flagged (sequential remains default)
Effect groups with shared IDs execute as a unit
Concurrent execution respects strategy (all-or-nothing, best-effort, etc.)

suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): wire concurrent effect execution into orchestration loop

title: Add priority queue and deadline-based scheduling for effects
acceptanceCriteria: Effects have a priority field (high, normal, low) that influences execution order
Deadline-based scheduling allows effects to specify latest acceptable start time

suggestedPrScope: feat(sdk): add priority queue and deadline scheduling for effects

title: Build coordinator process pattern for multi-harness parallel dispatch
acceptanceCriteria: Coordinator process template manages named teams of harness workers
Team composition persists across iterations (effectGroupRegistry)
Workers report progress to coordinator via streaming events
Coordinator aggregates results and makes routing decisions

suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): multi-harness parallel dispatch with coordinator pattern

title: Implement multiple compaction strategies with auto-compact triggers
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 compaction strategies: tool-output summarization, resolved-effect pruning, stale-context removal
Auto-compact triggers when context exceeds configurable token threshold
continuityState.ts preserves key decisions and findings across compaction
Compaction events logged to journal for debugging
Strategy selection configurable per run or via orchestration mode
suggestedPrScope: feat(platform): implement multiple compaction strategies with auto-triggers

title: Implement CC marketplace protocol adapter for plugin discovery and install
acceptanceCriteria: PluginSource interface abstracts marketplace protocol differences

title: Add plugin auto-update mechanism with startup reconciliation and rollback
acceptanceCriteria: Startup reconciliation checks installed plugin versions against marketplace

acceptanceCriteria: plugin:validate command checks manifest, permissions, hook types, and dependencies

title: Add plugin discovery as agentic tool and marketplace browsing during orchestration
acceptanceCriteria: plugin_search agentic tool discovers plugins from marketplace during orchestration
plugin_install agentic tool installs plugins mid-run

title: Implement run directory synchronization for remote WebSocket sessions
acceptanceCriteria: Remote clients can create runs that execute on the server

title: Enable parallel file operations through multi-session or batching approach
